Leap Forward.name: Leap Forward
Leap Forward.description: Triggering Dragon Breath deals 60% Damage to enemies within a range of 200, and increases the next Jump Stomp's Damage by 60%, up to a maximum of 600%.

Dragon Aura.name: Dragon Aura
Dragon Aura.description: Dragon Aura Protective Shield grants 100% damage reduction, decreasing by 10% after each action, down to a minimum of 20%.
